headline: A Look At NRG Energy (NRG) Valuation After Recent Share Price Weakness
summary: NRG Energy stock overview NRG Energy (NRG) has recently drawn investor attention after a period of weaker share performance, with the stock down about 12% over the past month and 17% over the past 3 months. See our latest analysis for NRG Energy. Despite the recent pullback, with the share price down 19.31% year to date and the latest close at $134.08, NRG Energy still sits on a very large 5 year total shareholder return above 3x. Momentum looks to be cooling after a strong multi year run. If...
